name: Bernie Sanders
subject: [Results] First big win of the night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
The polls just closed and we have earned our first victory of the night in Vermont.
It looks like the margin should be impressive as well. That means a lot of delegates for our campaign, which is very important. I think we are going to do quite well tonight.
As you watch the results, we've already started preparing for what's next: twelve VERY important primaries and caucuses over the next two weeks. But we have to be prepared to fight, organize, and win against anything the financial and political establishment are going to throw at us. That's why I have to ask you:
[**Can you make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign tonight? We 're doing very well so far, but your donation could mean the difference between victory or defeat in the states that come next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super_tuesday?refcode=em160301full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super_tuesday?refcode=em160301full")
No candidate for president can do it alone, and I want you to know that any success we enjoy tonight and in the states to come is because of the millions of working people who have come together through our campaign to say that we have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying our candidates and elections.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

body:
Our biggest day yet! | Friend --

Polls just closed on the East Coast, and already, we've won Virginia and Georgia.

CONGRATULATIONS!!! These wins belong to this whole team, and I am so proud of you. But we can't let up now.

**[Thank you for being a part of Team Hillary in Virginia. Now chip in $1 right now to help Hillary keep winning all month long.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ4NjE0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYwMjc4ODIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Tonight is huge for us. But even while we celebrate, we have to remember: This primary is far from over.

There are four more contests this weekend, and we're locked in tough fights in big states like Michigan, Ohio, and Washington, which all head to the polls later this month.

Bernie Sanders has the resources and the organization to stay in this race for a long time. If we're going to win the nomination, we need to rack up an insurmountable lead in delegates. That means we need to keep fighting hard in those states, plus all the rest that haven't voted or caucused yet. If we let up on the gas for even one contest, we could fall behind.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
These belong to you. | Friend --

Thank you. Tonight's victories belong to you.

When this race got tight in Iowa and tough in New Hampshire, you never wavered. We stood together when the tide turned in Nevada and when it became a wave in South Carolina. And now, from Texas to Georgia to Virginia, your passion and commitment are paying off.

**[Tonight, I'm asking you to chip in $1 to keep up the momentum as we compete in another dozen contests over the next few weeks.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ4NjE4NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYwMjg1MDAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

When you step up tonight, you're joining more than 850,000 people who've given to this campaign, most chipping in $100 or less.

These are people like the single father from Ohio who donated in honor of his 7-year-old daughter whose autism doesn't stop her from dreaming big. Or the 70-year-old disabled combat veteran from Nebraska who donated to a political campaign for the first time in his entire life.

Most of our supporters aren't millionaires or billionaires. They're just people who share our belief that love and kindness can trump hatred and bigotry.

The stakes in this election couldn't be higher. There is still a long way to go before we have the delegates necessary to win the Democratic nomination, but if we're in this fight together, we will win.

And when we do, our first task won't be to make America great again -- America is already great. Instead, we'll set out to make America whole again.

**Let's get to work. Chip in $1 right now:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ4NjE4NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYwMjg1MDAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Hillary

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Three more victories!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
We did very well tonight, sisters and brothers. It's all thanks to you.
We started off the night winning Vermont, then we won Oklahoma and Colorado, and moments ago they called Minnesota for us as well. FOUR big victories for our political revolution tonight.
No one thought we would get this far. You proved them wrong. Working people are coming together and voting for Bernie in states across the country. They are contributing small amounts of money so we can compete with the millionaires and billionaires bankrolling Hillary Clinton's campaign and her largest super PACs.
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign tonight and we 'll have the resources to continue our momentum into the twelve primaries and caucuses happening over the next two weeks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-next-victory?refcode=em160301full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-next-victory?refcode=em160301full")
Our campaign needs to be prepared for whatever comes next. I can assure you that our opponent's billionaires and lobbyists will do everything they can to stop our campaign in the twelve caucuses or primaries in the next two weeks.
You should be extraordinarily proud of what we accomplished tonight ... and we're just getting started. People should not underestimate us.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

name: Jonathan McConnell
subject: We fought the good fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend -- For months, we've taken on the Establishment and held Richard Shelby's feet to the fire. We've called on him to answer for the 37 years of corruption and cronyism that has defined his career in politics and we've called him out on his dirty campaign tactics. Still, it wasn't quite enough for David to beat Goliath -- but this won't be our final shot. Our nation is at a crossroads -- we're sick and tired of the status quo, the corruption, and the cronyism that plagues DC today. The deep pockets of the Establishment are keeping the grassroots from fighting back. But only for today. We've fought the good fight, but it isn't over. The Establishment is on the ropes, and it's our duty to keep it there. Together, we can, and will, bring new leadership and integrity to our nation's capitol. It will take time, and it'll be difficult, but momentum is on our side. Thank you for your support, and your faith. Jonathan

---
Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Daily Message

Dear Friend,

Last night, the
people of Texas, Oklahoma, and Alaska continued paving the path
to victory.

Ted Cruz has proven
he can beat Donald Trump - not once, not twice, not even thrice,
but four times! And Ted is the only candidate who can and will
beat Donald Trump for the nomination.

Republicans have a
choice. They can go with the Democrats' favored dealmaker, or
they can unite behind our campaign -- as we're seeing happen
across the country, and we can together nominate a proven
conservative who will bring back jobs and opportunities for
working men and women, who will protect every one of the Bill of
Rights, and who will restore peace through an overwhelming
position of strength.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

subject: Can you believe this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

As an American taxpayer, your share of our
ballooning $19 TRILLION national debt is $159,034.

That's how much the Washington Machine
expects you to pay for their reckless spending, all while BOTH
parties tell you there's nowhere to cut!

I think that is unacceptable.

As one of the few fiscal conservatives in the
U.S. Senate, I've made it my mission to ensure the American
people understand how their taxpayer dollars are being wasted.

As a result, I'm being targeted by big
spending Democrats in 2016. But I'm not backing down.

I'm standing for solutions.

Last week I proposed simple, common-sense
cuts from my Waste Report to the Senate Budget Committee.

Now I'm asking you to sign your name urging
them to do so, and make your most generous contribution of $50,
$25 or even $10 right away.

Anyone with a shred of common-sense
understands our federal government wastes money.

Both parties are to blame.

Should the American people really be paying
$6 million to promote tourism in Albania?

Or nearly a half-a-million dollars for
climate change video games?

Or $15.6 million for foreign students'
college tuition?

Or $43 million for a gas station in
Afghanistan?

Patriot, politicians in Washington, D.C.
today have gotten it in their heads that your money is theirs,
and they can spend it however they want.

In the process, they're taxing and spending
this country into oblivion.

I don't have a spare $159,034 laying around
to pay for it all.

If you don't either, we must stop this
madness.

Please take action right way by urging the
Senate Budget Committee to include my cuts in 2017 Budget.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $10 TODAY >>

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

body:
Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. We won huge victories in Texas, Oklahoma, and Alaska last night, and the campaign is now down to a two person race -- me vs. Donald Trump. Heidi and I owe you a debt of gratitude. |
**BREAKING: WE WON!**

[**Huge Super Tuesday Victory: I still need your help >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906610:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906610:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)
---
Friend,

Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

**We won huge victories in Texas, Oklahoma, and Alaska last night, and the campaign is now down to a two person race -- me vs. Donald Trump.**

Heidi and I owe you a debt of gratitude.

Our campaign is now in second place in the delegate count, and I am the ONLY candidate who can unify grassroots Republicans and defeat Donald Trump. We must not elect a candidate in Donald Trump who agrees with Hillary Clinton on issue after issue.

So while Heidi and I are extremely excited about what last night meant for our campaign and more importantly, for our nation -- **there is no time to rest.**

I will soon be on my way to Michigan for our next debate on Thursday night -- then on to Maine, Kansas, Louisiana, and other primary states as I take our winning, conservative message across America.

**Friend, I could not have come this far without your support.**

But let me be clear: [**I can't unite our Republican Party to defeat Hillary Clinton without your continued support, and I need it in the next 48 hours.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906610:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

Here are the facts: In order to win Texas, Oklahoma, and Alaska -- as well as pick up many delegates across other Super Tuesday states -- **I had to dig deep into our campaign accounts...all but depleting my political budget.**

If we stop for even a moment, we risk losing the momentum that we've worked so hard to build.

[**That's why, before I take the debate stage in less than 48 hours, I'm writing to ask you if I can personally count on your renewed support to help us win another round of primaries in just days (it's the only way I can compete)?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906610:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

After the hard-fought battle across the country on Super Tuesday, **I must raise TWO MILLION DOLLARS, or I risk wasting our Super Tuesday victory -- the victory you and the volunteers have worked tirelessly to help me secure.**

Can I count on you to renew your support, Friend?

[**I WILL RENEW MY SUPPORT FOR: $35 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906611:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

[**I WILL RENEW MY SUPPORT FOR: $100 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906612:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

[**I WILL RENEW MY SUPPORT FOR: $500 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906613:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

[**I WILL RENEW MY SUPPORT FOR: $1000 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906614:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

[**I'M ALL IN; I WILL RENEW MY SUPPORT FOR: $2700 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33906615:swJe7GCnN:m:1:1104269936:3F37CB4EF27B9620CBA2CA6587968E13:r)

We are here today -- on the verge of victory -- because of you.

After everything that the Washington Cartel threw at us and the millions spent against us by the party establishment, we still won.

Friend, this is our time to unite the Republican Party and defeat Donald Trump.

Will you renew your support?

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Ben Carson
subject: A personal statement about my campaign:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33912537:sRZZBGCgN:m:1:876315805:7A92378096B71E1966AB0F1BAF498976:r)
---

Peter,

As one of my most dedicated supporters, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

I have decided not to attend the Fox News GOP Presidential Debate tomorrow night in Detroit.

Even though I will not be in my hometown of Detroit on Thursday, I remain deeply committed to my home nation, America.

I do not see a political path forward in light of last evening's Super Tuesday primary results.

However, this grassroots movement on behalf of "We the People" will continue.

Along with millions of patriots who have supported my campaign for President, I remain committed to saving America for future generations. We must not depart from our goals to restore what God and our Founders intended for this exceptional nation.

I appreciate the support, financial and otherwise, from all corners of America.

Gratefully, my campaign decisions are not constrained by finances; rather by what is in the best interest of the American people.

I will discuss more about the future of this movement during my speech on Friday at CPAC in Washington, D.C.

Thank you for everything.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313**

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: This campaign is about transforming America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
Last night, voters in Colorado, Oklahoma, and Minnesota joined the people of Vermont and New Hampshire in showing America that a political revolution is spreading across our country.
One of the reasons I believe we are doing so well is because people know that this campaign is about more than electing a president - it is about transforming America. It's about making our country the great nation we know it has the potential to be. It is about dealing with some unpleasant truths, and having the guts to confront those truths.
Now, Wall Street and the super PACs may be against us; they have already spent outrageous sums of money to stop our progress. But what we are proving on our campaign is that when people stand together, anything is possible.
If we are going to win this primary and take our country back from the billionaire class, we have to be ready to fight, organize, and win in the states ahead. So I have to ask you today:
[**Your $2.70 contribution to our campaign strikes a blow against a corrupt campaign finance system and ensures we 'll have the resources we need to win this Democratic primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/transforming-america?refcode=em160302sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/transforming-america?refcode=em160302sub-c")
Fifteen states have voted, 35 remain. And let me assure you that we are going to take our fight for economic justice, for social justice, for environmental sanity, and for a world of peace to every one of those states. And we are going to win.
People should not underestimate us.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

subject: It's your choice
body:

---

Peter, This morning, one of the most important reproductive rights cases since _Roe v. Wade_ comes before the Supreme Court. And today illustrates why Pat Toomey needs to be replaced - **and not just because Toomey has advocated for a complete ban on a woman 's right to choose in Pennsylvania. ** **But he is also fighting nationally to delay justice for a woman 's right to choose in what is likely to be a deadlocked 4 - 4 decision, by Toomey's refusal to consider a Supreme Court nominee from our President. ** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17196bb/3476a20e/c6f4c89/274568a4/2164098044/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0302FBb1&amounts=15,25,50,75,150,250,500")
---
_**A woman 's right to choose belongs to her _-_ not lawyers or lawmakers.**_
In recent years, we have witnessed unprecedented assaults targeting women's ability to access essential reproductive health services in attempts to prevent them from making basic medical decisions regarding their own bodies.
I am a Catholic, I love my faith, but it is a woman's right to choose - period. [With your help - in whatever amount you can muster - I will fight to protect that right in the U.S. Senate.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17196bb/3476a20e/c6f4c89/274568a3/2164098044/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0302FBp1&amounts=15,25,50,75,150,250,500")

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: President Obama is with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22b8/738133e4/3487f442/7f83ff68/1712380226/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160302/?subsource=ngpattre160302")
---
"I am proud to endorse Congressman Patrick Murphy for the United States Senate. Patrick has been a tireless champion for middle-class families and a defender of the economic progress that American workers and businesses have made. In Congress, he's fought to strengthen Medicare and Social Security, reform our criminal justice system, and protect a woman's right to choose. Floridians can count on Patrick Murphy to stand up for them every day as their next Senator."
\-- **President Barack Obama** , 03/02/16
Friends,

President Obama has done historic things for our country during his time in office.

His healthcare overhaul has helped more than 1.5 million Floridians gain quality, affordable health insurance. He's fended off attack after attack on Planned Parenthood and women's health. His economic policies pulled us out of the Great Recession and have created more than 14 million jobs.

President Obama has supported some great causes in his time in office. **And now, he 's supporting us.**

I'm proud to announce that **President Barack Obama has endorsed our campaign for United States Senate.** This is a HUGE moment in this race -- and I wanted to give you a chance to be a part of it.

President Obama is in. [_**Are you? Click here to add your endorsement to President Obama 's >>**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22b8/738133e4/3487f442/7f83ff69/1712380226/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160302")

Ever since the President took office, Republicans in Congress have had one goal: **Obstruct anything President Obama does at all times at any cost.** Now Senate Republicans are even refusing to consider a Supreme Court nominee.

But the President hasn't given in -- and he's managed to get things done despite Republican efforts to thwart progress.

I truly appreciate what President Obama has done in office. That's why his confidence in me and this endorsement is so important. But the President only has 9 months left in office. Once he's gone, Florida needs a Senator who will keep fighting for progress.

**And that progress won 't happen with Mitch McConnell and Republicans leading the Senate.**

We have to take back Marco Rubio's seat. We have to win control of the Senate back. It's the only way to preserve the President's legacy and keep moving forward.

[**President Obama is in. This is a big moment -- add your endorsement to his.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22b8/738133e4/3487f442/7f83ff69/1712380226/VEsF/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160302")

I'm honored to have the President's endorsement. And I'm honored to have all of you on the team.

Thank you.

Patrick

Bernie Volunteer -

name: Rosalyn Levy Jonas (via vanhollen.org)
subject: in the trenches, not the sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

We know one thing is certain -- the Koch Brothers and big money special interests don't want Chris in the U.S. Senate.

Dark money operators understand that Chris won't stop until he ends their efforts to buy our elections. That's why they are going after him. They don't want him to shine the light of transparency on secret dark money expenditures.

The Koch Brothers are not the only ones targeting Chris. Unfortunately, a national SuperPac supporting our opponent has already spent $1 million in outside money to buy this election - and it's having an effect. Today we're officially just two months out and we need your help to make sure this election can't be bought by big money interests.

Marylanders deserve an effective leader on their side who will fight for them until the job is done. You can help make this happen. Donate $25 today and help ensure Big Money Interests don't win on Primary Day! (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616&amount=25.00&recurring=12)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Chip in $10 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em22616)

Chip in $35 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em22616)

Chip in $100 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em22616)

Chip in $250 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em22616)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616)
There are just two months to go before voters decide who the Democratic nominee will be for Senator. You and I know that Chris is the right leader for the job, but with big money special interests targeting Chris we need your help if we're going to succeed.

This Senate campaign will come down to a fundamental question -- are we going to let special interests speak for Maryland voters, or are we going to stand with Chris Van Hollen? Please donate $25 or whatever you can right now to help ensure that we send Chris to the U.S. Senate. (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616&amount=25.00&recurring=12)

Yvette Lewis
Campaign Co-Chair
Van Hollen for SenatePaid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
